## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Marcel Santilli (GrowthX) and Ody Pavlidis for a client operations role.](https://fathom.video/share/TExUQUZbfk7yjzsRq7vEjF__tdz82KhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is rapidly scaling, having raised $12M Series A and aiming for 100 clients this year](https://fathom.video/share/TExUQUZbfk7yjzsRq7vEjF__tdz82KhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [The company is building an AI-powered platform for knowledge workflows, starting with content marketing](https://fathom.video/share/TExUQUZbfk7yjzsRq7vEjF__tdz82KhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [GrowthX is seeking top talent, offering competitive compensation including equity and bonuses](https://fathom.video/share/TExUQUZbfk7yjzsRq7vEjF__tdz82KhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
  - [Ody expressed interest in the client operations role, with a salary range of 7-9K (currency unspecified)](https://fathom.video/share/TExUQUZbfk7yjzsRq7vEjF__tdz82KhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Business Model and Growth

  - [Started as an agency, now transitioning to a technology play](https://fathom.video/share/TExUQUZbfk7yjzsRq7vEjF__tdz82KhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Building an engine for knowledge workflows, starting with content marketing](https://fathom.video/share/TExUQUZbfk7yjzsRq7vEjF__tdz82KhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
  - [Raised $12M Series A, aiming for $20M ARR this year](https://fathom.video/share/TExUQUZbfk7yjzsRq7vEjF__tdz82KhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [Current client base: 35 clients, mostly on 12-month deals](https://fathom.video/share/TExUQUZbfk7yjzsRq7vEjF__tdz82KhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1975.0)
  - [Notable clients: Reddit (expanded from $9K to $20K/month), Hagen ($40K/month)](https://fathom.video/share/TExUQUZbfk7yjzsRq7vEjF__tdz82KhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
  - [Pipeline of 60 potential deals, totaling $8M](https://fathom.video/share/TExUQUZbfk7yjzsRq7vEjF__tdz82KhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1480.0)

### Technology and Product

  - [Developing a platform that creates config files for knowledge workflows](https://fathom.video/share/TExUQUZbfk7yjzsRq7vEjF__tdz82KhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=899.0)
  - [Includes a runtime layer, workflow agents, and AI-powered components](https://fathom.video/share/TExUQUZbfk7yjzsRq7vEjF__tdz82KhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Aims to disrupt traditional agency services with AI-driven efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/TExUQUZbfk7yjzsRq7vEjF__tdz82KhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
  - [Expanding beyond SEO to content distribution, conversion, and more](https://fathom.video/share/TExUQUZbfk7yjzsRq7vEjF__tdz82KhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)

### Talent Acquisition Strategy

  - [Hiring top talent from leading agencies and tech companies](https://fathom.video/share/TExUQUZbfk7yjzsRq7vEjF__tdz82KhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)
  - [Offering competitive compensation, equity, and bonuses](https://fathom.video/share/TExUQUZbfk7yjzsRq7vEjF__tdz82KhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
  - [Aiming to hire 60 people by year-end, including 25 engineers](https://fathom.video/share/TExUQUZbfk7yjzsRq7vEjF__tdz82KhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [Targeting managing directors, client operations, and other key roles](https://fathom.video/share/TExUQUZbfk7yjzsRq7vEjF__tdz82KhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1413.0)

### Client Operations Role

  - [Directly reporting to Marcel, working closely with VP of Ops (Chief of Staff)](https://fathom.video/share/TExUQUZbfk7yjzsRq7vEjF__tdz82KhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2537.0)
  - [Responsibilities include process implementation, capacity planning, work stream development](https://fathom.video/share/TExUQUZbfk7yjzsRq7vEjF__tdz82KhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2392.0)
  - [Need for formalized processes: NPS measurement, client satisfaction tracking, load balancing](https://fathom.video/share/TExUQUZbfk7yjzsRq7vEjF__tdz82KhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2403.0)

### Compensation and Benefits

  - [Offering top-of-market compensation with flexibility based on location and experience](https://fathom.video/share/TExUQUZbfk7yjzsRq7vEjF__tdz82KhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2828.0)
  - [Equity offered for key roles, including client operations](https://fathom.video/share/TExUQUZbfk7yjzsRq7vEjF__tdz82KhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2885.0)
  - [Using Remote.com, transitioning to Deal for payroll and compliance](https://fathom.video/share/TExUQUZbfk7yjzsRq7vEjF__tdz82KhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2582.0)
  - [Aiming for "life-changing" equity potential due to current reasonable valuation](https://fathom.video/share/TExUQUZbfk7yjzsRq7vEjF__tdz82KhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2598.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to introduce Ody to Bridget (Chief of Staff) and Kyle (current head of accounts)](https://fathom.video/share/TExUQUZbfk7yjzsRq7vEjF__tdz82KhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=3103.0)
  - [Schedule a deeper dive session with Marcel after initial interviews](https://fathom.video/share/TExUQUZbfk7yjzsRq7vEjF__tdz82KhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=3108.0)
  - [Marcel to prepare a comprehensive offer including compensation details](https://fathom.video/share/TExUQUZbfk7yjzsRq7vEjF__tdz82KhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=3140.0)
  - [Aim to complete the entire process within a week](https://fathom.video/share/TExUQUZbfk7yjzsRq7vEjF__tdz82KhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=3131.0)
  - [Ody to sign an NDA before the deeper dive session for more detailed discussions](https://fathom.video/share/TExUQUZbfk7yjzsRq7vEjF__tdz82KhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=3120.0)
